entities.name: arolariu.ro Monorepo
observations: Full-stack monorepo: Next.js 16.1.6 frontend + .NET 10 backend + component library + SvelteKit CV + Python experimental service
Managed with Nx, npm >=11, Node.js >=24
5 sites: arolariu.ro (Next.js), api.arolariu.ro (.NET), cv.arolariu.ro (SvelteKit), exp.arolariu.ro (Python/FastAPI), docs.arolariu.ro (DocFX)
AI customization: 13 instruction files, 6 agents, 11 prompts, 4 skills, 3 CLI extensions, 2 governance protocols
Infrastructure: Azure Cloud, Bicep IaC, GitHub Actions CI/CD

entities.name: Frontend (arolariu.ro)
observations: Next.js 16.1.6 with App Router, React 19.2.4, TypeScript 5.9.3 strict mode
Island Pattern: page.tsx (RSC) → island.tsx (Client) → _components/ (local)
State: Zustand 5.0.11 (4 stores with IndexedDB persistence) → Context (scoped) → useState (local)
i18n: next-intl 4.8.3 with en.json, ro.json, fr.json
Auth: Clerk (@clerk/nextjs 6.37.4)
Styling: Tailwind CSS 4.1.18, NO inline styles
Testing: Vitest 4.0.18, 90%+ coverage target
Components: @arolariu/components shared library
Zero any types — TypeScript strict mode enforced

entities.name: Backend (api.arolariu.ro)
observations: .NET 10.0, C# 13, Modular Monolith with Domain-Driven Design
Architecture: The Standard (5 layers) — Endpoints → Processing → Orchestration → Foundation → Brokers
Florance Pattern: max 2-3 dependencies per service
Bounded Contexts: General (Core), Auth (Core.Auth), Invoices (Domain), Common (Shared)
TryCatch pattern with OpenTelemetry Activity tracing on all service methods
Brokers are thin wrappers ONLY — no business logic
No sideways calls: Foundation↔Foundation forbidden, use Orchestration
XML docs required on all public APIs, TreatWarningsAsErrors enabled
85%+ test coverage target, xUnit + MSTest

entities.name: Zustand Stores
observations: 4 stores: useInvoicesStore, useMerchantsStore, useScansStore, usePreferencesStore
All use IndexedDB persistence via Dexie + devtools middleware
Factory: createEntityStore.ts for entity-pattern stores (used by scansStore)
Import from barrel: import { useInvoicesStore } from '@/stores'
Use useShallow for object selectors to prevent unnecessary re-renders
Zustand version: 5.0.11

entities.name: RFC System
observations: RFCs in docs/rfc/ — numbered by domain: 0xxx (infra), 1xxx (frontend), 2xxx (backend)
RFC 0001: GitHub Actions workflows and caching strategy
RFC 1001: Frontend OpenTelemetry observability
RFC 1002: JSDoc/TSDoc documentation standard
RFC 1003: Internationalization (next-intl)
RFC 1004: Metadata and SEO system
RFC 1005: State management (Zustand)
RFC 1006: Component library architecture
RFC 1007: Advanced frontend patterns
RFC 2001: Domain-Driven Design architecture
RFC 2002: Backend OpenTelemetry observability
RFC 2003: The Standard implementation
RFC 2004: XML documentation standard
Always consult relevant RFCs before architectural changes

entities.name: Component Library
observations: Package: @arolariu/components at packages/components/
60+ Radix UI + shadcn/ui components with Tailwind CSS
Built with RSLib + Rsbuild, documented with Storybook
Barrel export: src/index.ts (MUST update when adding components)
Domain-agnostic — NO business logic, NO imports from sites/
Use cn() for class merging, React.forwardRef for DOM refs, cva for variants

entities.name: Experimental Service (exp.arolariu.ro)
observations: Python 3.12 + FastAPI + uvicorn
Configuration proxy and feature flag service
Ruff linting: E, F, I, W, UP, B, SIM, RUF with 120-char line length
Tests: pytest with *.test.py pattern, importlib import mode
Feature flags: bare names in catalog, FeatureManagement: prefix in storage
API: /api/v1/config, /api/health, /api/ready

entities.name: The Standard Architecture
observations: 5 layers: Endpoints → Processing → Orchestration → Foundation → Brokers
Brokers: thin wrappers over external dependencies, NO business logic
Foundation: CRUD + domain validation, 1-2 Broker dependencies
Orchestration: coordinate multiple Foundation services, 2-3 dependencies
Processing: heavy computation, batch operations, 1-2 Orchestration dependencies
Endpoints: HTTP protocol mapping, 1 Processing service dependency
Florance Pattern: max 2-3 dependencies per service layer
